name: swiss-azure-auth
description: Frontend and backend Azure auth scaffold

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix mobile
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.dev:mobile-backend: concurrently -n mobile,backend -c cyan,green "npm run start --prefix mobile" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix frontend && npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix mobile
scripts.precommit:check: npm run test && npm run precommit:lint-format
